title: Better Crafts

body:
# Better Crafts

--- [![Sparked Host](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1330912431496495165/1490018985675198534/Artboard_2-1.png?ex=69d287d1&is=69d13651&hm=fa99fc9a0f45b09a7ef09ae91ba8f79d8cd7e3b1a06fd73b17010a9561bbfad1&)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3220)

--- ![About](https://i.ibb.co/6JmH2sZm/about.png) This datapack add's **BETTER CRAFTS!** - Mending Book, - Armor Stand with Arms, - XP Bottle, - Rotten Flesh for Leather in Furnace and Campfire --- ![Our Other Projects](https://i.ibb.co/1Y5pLfY5/our-other-projects.png) - [🌱 Better Plantations](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-plantations) - [🌎 All Things Possible](https://modrinth.com/mod/all-things-possible) - [🎤 All Simple Voice Chat Connections!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/simple-voice-chat-connections!) - [🔨 Repair Anvil](https://modrinth.com/datapack/repair-anvil) - [🍎 Colored Apples](https://modrinth.com/datapack/colored-apples) - [🌙 EdonMe Core](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/edonme-core) ---
